opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I haven't slept a wink in two nights, my brain won't shut off, and I feel like I'm losing my mind from exhaustion.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I'm desperate - I can't function, I'm too wiped out to think straight, and I really need something to help me sleep tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: about two days ago, right after I found out I'd been made redundant at work
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly 48 hours with barely any sleep at all
symptom_narrative.character: I just lie there with my mind racing and I can't switch off; when I do wake in the night I absolutely cannot get back to sleep
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe - it's the worst I've ever felt, I feel wired and shattered at the same time
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: it's not a pain, it's the sleeplessness and the exhaustion
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: every night since it started; I doze off then jolt awake and that's it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far - not tea, not lying in the dark
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the more I worry about not sleeping, the worse it gets
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I'm exhausted and foggy in the daytime, really irritable, and my nerves feel shot
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no, I've always been a good sleeper until this week
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't concentrate, I don't feel safe to drive, and I'm getting nothing done

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, just been made redundant, and is very distressed and worried about coping on his own

objective_data_offered.value: I look wrecked - dark circles under my eyes and I feel jittery and restless, I can't sit still
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: the patient's own impression of how he looks and feels, not a clinician observation

objective_data_offered.value: I've drunk loads of chamomile tea and taken some over-the-counter valerian tablets, but they've done absolutely nothing
my bedroom's cluttered and I've got my laptop and phone right on the bedside table - I'm on them a lot when I can't sleep
